title: Comprehensive Network Security Assessment & Incident Response Lifecycle
description: A flowchart depicting the end-to-end process of preparing for, executing, and responding to a security incident, often simulated or experienced during an examination scenario.
elements: Implementation of Security Controls (e.g., Firewall Rules, Encryption)
relationships: Process begins with Threat Identification which feeds into Vulnerability Assessment
Vulnerability Assessment and Threat Identification are analyzed together in Risk Analysis
Risk Analysis dictates the Implementation of specific Security Controls
Implemented Controls are continuously monitored via Intrusion Detection
A detected incident triggers the Incident Response Execution process
The entire cycle concludes with Post-Incident Analysis which feeds back into improved Threat Identification and Risk Analysis for future hardening
